“The Aces drafted me in 2018 to shoot that basketball. And I’m going to continue to do that because that’s just who I am.”

Congratulations
on making history and tying the WNBA single-game scoring record with 53 points 🏀 Continue building your legacy and playing your game.

Congratulations @aja22wilson on making history and tying the WNBA single-game scoring record with 53 points 🏀 Continue building your legacy and playing your game.

fragments.plaintext:
✅Engineered mesh upper
✅Pebble-grain leather overlay
✅React foam insole

In partnership with Vanessa Bryant, the ‘Halo’ colorway concept and launch was created as a way to honor Kobe’s birthday each year.

Arriving globally August 23 in SNKRS, the ‘Halo’ concept will be an annual release that will celebrate this special date.

The legend Diana Taurasi is the embodiment of dedication, passion and love for the game.
